hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_RESULT_FILE"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(tsx|jsx|html|css|scss)$"; then echo "[UX Feedback] UI file modified: $FILE — run /ux-review for automated UX analysis"; fi'
echo '[TrackFit UX UI Pro Max] Session complete. Run /ux-review to audit all UI changes, /design to sync with Canva, or /feedback to get full UX feedback report.'
